settings.text: Berkeley Life’s mission is to help people understand the **crucial role Nitric Oxide plays in their overall health**, empowering them to build a strong foundation for total wellbeing.

Through rigorous clinical trials, knowledge-sharing, and life-changing products, we are setting a new standard for the industry. With our clinically backed, two-step approach, you can take a proactive path towards improved vitality, longevity, and integrated health. Start here, and let Berkeley Life take you anywhere.

Berkeley Life started with a test strip, and a deep understanding of the powerful health benefits of supporting Nitric Oxide levels in the body. Since 2016, we’ve been dedicated to creating the industry’s best and most complete system for a foundation for total health.   

Our vision is to leave behind a world in which Nitric Oxide is considered as fundamental to everyday wellbeing as proper hydration and exercise. By sharing access to our complete support system, we hold the power to radically transform health for all people.

We offer a patented, non-invasive saliva test strip to help you monitor your N.O. levels. Designed for daily use, the test strips help you track your baseline, measure levels before and after physical activity, and assess progress after nitrate-rich meals or supplementation. So you can confidently monitor your success and see real-time results as you work toward your health goals.

settings.title: Scientific Champion
settings.text: Grounded in rigorous research, we prioritize science-backed insights to deliver the most effective and trustworthy supplements that build a foundation of total health.

settings.title: Health Empowerment
settings.text: We are dedicated to empowering people to take ownership of better health and vitality, and supporting a holistic approach to lifelong well-being.

settings.title: Trusted Authority
settings.text: We ensure that every product delivers measurable, effective benefits you can rely on, with education and insights to help you understand the purpose behind our products.

settings.title: Straightforward Wellness
settings.text: We simplify the path to wellness and help you commit to and invest in yourself with one daily habit that starts at and strengthens your health’s foundation.

With over 28,000 research articles on Nitric Oxide and three clinical trials backing our formulations, our commitment to science and integrity is unmatched.
Our products are rigorously researched, validated, and manufactured to the highest standards of quality, safety, and transparency—so you can trust every step of the process.

settings.heading: NITRIC OXIDE SUPPORT
settings.content: Radiate great health and experience a whole new you with just two capsules a day
